name: Crown of Roses
descs:
Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on a random enemy(or all Abnormality parts).

When activating Gluttony Absolute Resonance, inflict 2 [Burst] Potency on all enemies at Combat Start.

Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on <style="upgradeHighlight">2 random enemies</style>(or all Abnormality parts).

When activating Gluttony Absolute Resonance, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">3 [Burst] Potency</style> on all enemies at Combat Start.

Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on <style="upgradeHighlight">3 random enemies</style>(or all Abnormality parts).

When activating Gluttony Absolute Resonance, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">4 [Burst] Potency</style> on all enemies at Combat Start.
